cases.name: shortest path across two hops
cases.cypher: MATCH p = allShortestPaths((s)-[*1..]->(e)) WHERE s.name = 'SOME NAME' AND e.name = 'n3' RETURN p

cases.name: shortest path single hop
cases.cypher: MATCH p = allShortestPaths((s)-[*1..]->(e)) WHERE s.name = 'SOME NAME' AND e.name = '1234' RETURN p

cases.name: shortest path wrong direction returns empty
cases.cypher: MATCH p = allShortestPaths((s)-[*1..]->(e)) WHERE s.name = 'n3' AND e.name = 'SOME NAME' RETURN p

cases.name: shortest path to self returns empty
cases.cypher: MATCH p = allShortestPaths((s)-[*1..]->(e)) WHERE s.name = 'SOME NAME' AND e.name = 'SOME NAME' RETURN p
